# PilotPlan

> PilotPlan (https://pilotplan.vercel.app) is an AI solution architect for
> businesses. Describe a business problem and it researches the live web
> (vendor pricing, community reviews, official docs, real case studies),
> evaluates 6-10 real candidate solutions against the company's actual
> constraints, and produces a step-by-step implementation plan: tools with
> reasoning, total cost of ownership with linked sources, rollout phases with
> exit criteria, risks, internal tickets, and a vendor outreach email.
> Free during beta. Exportable as PDF and shareable by link.

## Pages
- [Home / generator](https://pilotplan.vercel.app): describe a problem, answer one follow-up question, get the plan
- [About](https://pilotplan.vercel.app/about): who built it and how it works

## Notes for AI agents
- Reports are generated per request from live web research; content is not a static database
- Generated reports are informational, not professional advice
- (c) 2026 Govind Waghmare. All rights reserved.
